class.name: CSVRowModel
class.brief_description: Schema-driven typed row converter for CSV data.
class.description: CSVRowModel stores a dictionary schema and applies it to CSV rows. It can cast dictionaries or array rows into typed dictionaries, apply defaults, validate required fields and enum values, and serialize rows for CSV export.

method.name: cast_row
method.description: Returns a typed dictionary for [param row], applying defaults where available.

method.name: from_file
method.description: Creates a row model by loading a schema dictionary from [param path].

method.name: from_schema
method.description: Creates a row model from [param schema].

method.name: get_field_names
method.description: Returns schema field names in declaration order.

method.name: get_schema
method.description: Returns a copy of the current schema.

method.name: infer_from_rows
method.description: Creates a model by inferring schema definitions from dictionaries or array rows. String values are parsed with DotCSV conversion rules before type inference.

method.name: infer_from_table
method.description: Creates a model by inferring schema definitions from the rows in [param table].

method.name: load_schema
method.description: Loads a schema dictionary from [param path] and replaces the current schema.

method.name: save_schema
method.description: Saves the current schema dictionary to [param path].

method.name: serialize_row
method.description: Returns a dictionary suitable for CSV export. Values are cast first; missing defaulted fields are included when [param include_defaults] is [code]true[/code].

method.name: validate_row
method.description: Validates [param row] and returns a report with [code]ok[/code], [code]errors[/code], and casted row data.

method.name: validate_rows
method.description: Validates each row and includes its row index in each report.
